steps.description: Delete parseClaimsJwt/decode-without-verify path and keep only parseClaimsJws-based verification.
Ensure all claims extraction performs signature validation.

steps.vulnerability_name: Add dashboard regression test for invalid JWT signature
steps.description: Prevent reintroduction by asserting /dashboard returns 401 for tampered tokens.

verification.description: Tampered-signature dashboard token must be rejected
Valid signed token should still succeed
verification.curl: TOKEN=$(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8888/identity/api/auth/login -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"email":"test@test.com","password":"Password123!"}' | jq -r .token) && curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}\n' -X GET 'http://localhost:8888/identity/api/v2/user/dashboard' -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN"
